title: UPI OC No 210 FY 24 25 Guidelines for volume cap for Third Party App Providers (TPAPs) in UPI
text:
Nee

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/(OC210/2024-25 315' December 2024
To,
All Members of UPI

Dear Madam/Sir,

Guidelines for volume cap for Third Party App Providers (TPAPs) in UPI

We invite reference to our earlier circulars NPCI/UPI/(OC-97/2020-2021 dated 5'" November
2020 and NPCI/UPI/OC159/2022-2023 dated 2"! December 2022 on “Guidelines for volume
cap for Third Party App Providers (TPAPs) in UPI”.

Considering various factors, the timeline for compliance of existing TPAPs who are exceeding
the volume cap, is extended by two (2) years i.e. till December 31, 2026.

Yours sincerely,
SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia

Chief of Products

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 057.
